theorem:  insertionsort_correct
sample:   2
attempt:  init

[proof]
intro l
induction l with
| nil =>
  constructor
  · simp [insertionsort, Sorted.nil]
  · exact lemma_hint_21
| cons x xs ih =>
  rcases ih with ⟨hs, hp⟩
  constructor
  ·
    have hins : ∀ ys, Sorted ys → Sorted (insert_ x ys) := by
      intro ys hy
      induction hy with
      | nil =>
        simp [insert_]
        exact Sorted.singleton
      | singleton =>
        simp [insert_]
        by_cases h : x < x_1
        · simp [h]
          exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton (by intro hx; exact h hx)
        · simp [h]
          exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton h
      | @cons a b xs hsrt hab ihs =>
        simp [insert_]
        by_cases hax : x < a
        · simp [hax]
          exact Sorted.cons (Sorted.cons hsrt hab) (by intro hx; exact hax hx)
        · simp [hax]
          by_cases hxb : x < b
          · exact lemma_hint_28 a x hax b xs (Sorted.cons hsrt hab) (ihs hsrt) hxb
          · have htail : Sorted (b :: xs) := hsrt
            have hinsTail : Sorted (insert_ x (b :: xs)) := ihs hsrt
            exact Sorted.cons hinsTail (by
              intro hba
              exact hxb ((lt_of_not_lt hab) hba))
    exact hins _ hs
  · exact lemma_hint_3 x xs

[lean error]
location:
              simp [insert_]
              by_cases h : x < x_1
                              ^
              · simp [h]
error: error(lean.unknownIdentifier): Unknown identifier `x_1`

location:
              by_cases h : x < x_1
              · simp [h]
               ^
                exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton (by intro hx; exact h hx)
error: `simp` made no progress

location:
                exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton (by intro hx; exact h hx)
              · simp [h]
               ^
                exact Sorted.cons Sorted.singleton h
error: `simp` made no progress

location:
              · simp [hax]
                exact Sorted.cons (Sorted.cons hsrt hab) (by intro hx; exact hax hx)
                                                                            ^
              · simp [hax]
error: Function expected at
  hax
but this term has type
  x < a
Note: Expected a function because this term is being applied to the argument
  hx

location:
                by_cases hxb : x < b
                · exact lemma_hint_28 a x hax b xs (Sorted.cons hsrt hab) (ihs hsrt) hxb
                                                                          ^
                · have htail : Sorted (b :: xs) := hsrt
error: Function expected at
  ihs
but this term has type
  Sorted (insert_ x (b :: xs))
Note: Expected a function because this term is being applied to the argument
  hsrt

location:
                · have htail : Sorted (b :: xs) := hsrt
                  have hinsTail : Sorted (insert_ x (b :: xs)) := ihs hsrt
                                                                 ^
                  exact Sorted.cons hinsTail (by
error: Function expected at
  ihs
but this term has type
  Sorted (insert_ x (b :: xs))
Note: Expected a function because this term is being applied to the argument
  hsrt

location:
                  have hinsTail : Sorted (insert_ x (b :: xs)) := ihs hsrt
                  exact Sorted.cons hinsTail (by
                                   ^
                    intro hba
error: Application type mismatch: The argument
  hinsTail
has type
  Sorted (insert_ x (b :: xs))
but is expected to have type
  Sorted (?m.165 :: ?m.166)
in the application
  Sorted.cons hinsTail

location:
                    intro hba
                    exact hxb ((lt_of_not_lt hab) hba))
                               ^
          exact hins _ hs
error: error(lean.unknownIdentifier): Unknown identifier `lt_of_not_lt`
